triples.subject: Global penetration
triples.sentence: Global penetration is seen rising to 13% this year from 12% in 2023.

triples.subject: China
triples.object: stronger demand growth for plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (PHEVs) through 2026
triples.sentence: the authors remain constructive on BEV sales growth through 2030, but note that through 2026 demand growth will likely be stronger for plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (PHEVs).

triples.subject: 2024 EV sales forecasts
triples.object: 1.47 million units of new EV sales, or 9.1% penetration
triples.sentence: Applying the matrix to their 2024–25 EV sales forecasts, the authors forecast 1.47 million units of new EV sales, or 9.1% penetration in 2024.

triples.subject: 2025 EV sales forecast
triples.sentence: For 2025, the forecast is for 2.34 million units, or 13.8% penetration.
